title: ABB India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ABB India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
